auth_notes: Requires a HubSpot Developer Account to create an app for OAuth2 or a Private App Access Token. Scopes must be granularly defined for CRM, Service, and Settings access.
rate_limits: 100 requests per 10 seconds for Professional and Enterprise accounts; 10 requests per second for Free/Starter. Daily limit of 250,000 to 1,000,000 calls depending on tier.
gotchas: Search API Indexing: Newly created or updated records can take up to 5 minutes to appear in Search API results, causing issues with immediate sequential lookups.
Internal Property Names: n8n requires the internal 'system' name for custom properties, not the user-facing label.
Association Requirements: Linking objects (e.g., a Ticket to a Company) requires specific Association Type IDs which are not always intuitive in the UI.
client_must_provide: Private App Access Token (with required scopes)
List of custom property internal names
OAuth Client ID and Secret (if using custom OAuth app)
research_notes: HubSpot is the primary provider for this category in n8n. While it handles CRM and Service well, 'Inventory' functionality often requires the Product/Line Item API or custom objects. Webhooks are supported via HubSpot Workflows (requires Professional tier) or the Webhooks API.

effort_recommendation.rationale: HubSpot is the primary provider for this category in n8n. While it handles CRM and Service well, 'Inventory' functionality often requires the Product/Line Item API or custom objects. Webhooks are supported via HubSpot Workflows (requires Professional tier) or the Webhooks API.
